prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年均为第10名，稳居全国Top10顶尖高校行列，办学层次极高；近年声誉整体偏中 性，2023年曾因宿舍问题有偏负面舆情，2024年涉及师德师风谣言但已澄清；抖音热度为"较热"级别（总排名第24），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度稳定；第五轮学科评估A+学科4个（动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、机械工程、电气工程），A学科6个（力学、工商管理、数学、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、计算 机科学与技术），A-学科3个（生物医学工程、电子科学与技术、马克思主义理论），A-及以上共13个，工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气 、计算机、自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年考生总数约66,000人（含不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约44,550人，较2025年44,491人基本持平；西安交通大学位于陕西，与宁夏同属西北地区，地理距离较近，地域偏好正面；该校在宁夏招生计划占比较小，属跨省招生常态。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次259名、2026年计划缩招约14.5%导致竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次与优势学科持续吸引高分考生、本省考生规模基本持平，预计2026年最低位次较20 25年略有前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约246名，区间216–276名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 484 → 259 → 290 → 259. After 2023, it stabilized around 260, with a baseline of about 259 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past 3 years is about 30 places, showing an overall stable trend. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 68 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 69 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category has 39 places plus medical category 20 places, totaling 59, a reduction of about 14.5% compared to 69 in 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranked 10th, firmly in the top 10顶尖高校行列, with an extremely high level of education. In recent years, its reputation has been generally neutral. In 2023, there was some negative public opinion due to dormitory issues, and in 2024, rumors about teacher ethics were clarified. On Douyin, its popularity is at a 'relatively hot' level (ranked 24th overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure and stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 4 A+ disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 6 A disciplines (Mechanics, Business Administration, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and 3 A- disciplines (Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marxist Theory), totaling 13 disciplines at A- or above. Its engineering strength is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 66,000 (including uncertainties), with an estimated physics category of about 44,550 based on historical proportions, roughly the same as 44,491 in 2025. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi, which is in the same northwest region as Ningxia, with a relatively close geographical distance and positive regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia accounts for a small proportion, which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 259, the approximately 14.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, and the provincial candidate scale remaining basically unchanged, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 246, with a range of 216–276.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<216), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 leading classes and popular engineering majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西安交通大学医学类在宁夏近四年最低录取位次分别为：2022年1046名（计划27人）、2023年853名（计划25人）、2024年4532名（计划23人）、2025年1394名（计划23人）。20 24年位次出现异常大幅下滑，可能与当年新高考改革批次合并等因素有关；2025年位次迅速回升至1394名，回归正常水平。2026年医学类在宁夏计划招生20人，较2025年减少3人 （缩招约13%），招生名额的缩减将加剧竞争，推动位次进一步上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家'985工程'和'211工程'首批重点建设高校，入选国家'双一流'建设高校名单。学校综合实力位居全国前列，医学部历史悠久、学 科实力雄厚，临床医学等专业在西北地区享有极高声誉，对宁夏考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在宁夏地区报考热度持续高涨，尤其是临床医学（5+3一体化）等长学制、高本硕贯通培养的专业备受高分考生青睐。西安交通大学地处陕西省西安市，地理位置优越 ，交通便利，对西北地区考生吸引力强。2026年医学类在宁夏仅招20人，招生规模较小，进一步推高了录取门槛。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，2026年西安交通大学医学类在宁夏的最低录取位次预计为1255名左右，波动区间为1155至1355名。由于2026年招生计划缩减，叠 加医学类专业持续高热，位次较2025年（1394名）预计小幅上升（更难进），但考虑到2024年异常波动后的回归趋势已基本完成，上升幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Ningxia over the past four years are: 2022: 1046th (planned 27 students), 2023: 853rd (planned 25 students), 2024: 4532nd (planned 23 students), 2025: 1394th (planned 23 students). The ranking in 2024 experienced an abnormal sharp decline, possibly due to factors such as the merger of batches in the new college entrance examination reform that year; the ranking quickly rebounded to 1394th in 2025, returning to a normal level. In 2026, the medical category plans to enroll 20 students in Ningxia, a decrease of 3 students compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 13%). The reduction in enrollment quotas will intensify competition, pushing the ranking further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, one of the first batch of key construction universities in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the national 'Double First-Class' construction university list. The university's overall strength ranks among the top in the country. Its medical department has a long history and strong disciplinary strength. Majors such as clinical medicine enjoy a very high reputation in the Northwest region, exerting a sustained attraction for Ningxia candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of medical majors in the Ningxia region continues to be high, especially long-term programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) and other programs that offer bachelor's to master's continuous training, which are favored by high-scoring candidates. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an City, Shaanxi Province, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, making it highly attractive to candidates from the Northwest region. In 2026, the medical category will only enroll 20 students in Ningxia, with a small enrollment scale, further raising the admission threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of historical ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Ningxia in 2026 is expected to be around 1255th, with a fluctuation range of 1155 to 1355. Due to the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, coupled with the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the ranking is expected to rise slightly compared to 2025 (1394th) (making it harder to enter), but considering that the rebound trend after the abnormal fluctuation in 2024 has largely been completed, the increase is limited.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1155-1355), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) has the highest ranking requirement, requiring a ranking within 600 to have a greater chance; Clinical Medicine (Medical Class) and Medical Experimental Class (Medical Category) are of medium difficulty; the Pharmacy category has a relatively lower ranking requirement, suitable for candidates with lower rankings to fill in steadily.
